frames.image_prompt: Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Extreme close-up of a slender, pale female hand trembling as it raises a crystal champagne coupe. Background softly blurred with white floral arch and warm golden hour sunlight filtering through petals. Shallow depth of field, warm golden hour lighting with soft lens flare.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Wide shot under a white floral arch in an outdoor garden wedding venue. On the left stands Su Wan, a 28-32 year old woman with black hair in an elegant bridal updo, fair white skin, slender build, wearing a white mermaid wedding gown with hidden monogram embroidery at the waist, holding a champagne coupe. Facing her on the right stands Lu Shen, a 30-35 year old tall man with short side-parted well-groomed hair, tan wheat-colored skin, tall and upright build, wearing a black three-piece tuxedo with a white rose boutonniere on his chest. Their eyes lock. Su Wan's lips form a gentle smile but her eyes are ice-cold. Warm golden hour backlighting, white flowers and greenery framing the scene.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Medium shot under a white floral arch at an outdoor garden wedding. Su Wan, a 28-32 year old woman with black hair in an elegant bridal updo, fair white skin, slender build, wearing a white mermaid wedding gown with hidden monogram embroidery visible at the waist, gazes lovingly at Lu Shen. Lu Shen, a 30-35 year old tall man with short side-parted well-groomed hair, tan wheat-colored skin, wearing a black three-piece tuxedo with a white rose boutonniere, smiles elegantly and gently holds her hand. Warm natural sunlight, soft romantic atmosphere.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Close-up detail shot of the waist area of a white mermaid wedding gown showing delicate hidden monogram embroidery. At the side of the gown, a phone screen emits a faint blue-white glow. The bride's slender fingers rest near the phone. Background is the softly blurred floral arch. Warm natural lighting with a subtle cold phone screen glow on the fabric.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Extreme close-up of a phone screen held low at waist level. The screen displays a text message in Chinese and English: 'The groom killed your sister. The evidence is in his jacket pocket.' The screen casts cold blue-white light upward. Blurred white mermaid wedding gown fabric visible around the edges. Cold screen lighting dominates the frame.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Extreme close-up of Su Wan's face, a 28-32 year old woman with black hair in an elegant bridal updo, fair white skin. Her pupils are visibly contracted, eyes wide with shock. Cold blue phone screen light illuminates the lower half of her face from below, creating dramatic under-lighting. Her jaw is tight, fingers barely visible at the edge of frame gripping tightly. Despite the shock in her eyes, her lips are pressed into a controlled, composed line. The next instant she forces a flawless smile. Dark background contrasts with the cold light on her face.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Over-the-shoulder shot from behind Lu Shen's right shoulder. Su Wan, a 28-32 year old woman with black hair in an elegant bridal updo, fair white skin, slender build, wearing a white mermaid wedding gown, leans in elegantly holding a champagne coupe, her lips nearly touching Lu Shen's ear as she whispers. Lu Shen's short side-parted well-groomed hair and the edge of his black three-piece tuxedo with white rose boutonniere are visible in the foreground. Dramatic lighting with warm ambient on one side and cold shadow on the other.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Extreme close-up of Lu Shen's eyes. Lu Shen, a 30-35 year old man with short side-parted well-groomed hair, tan wheat-colored skin. His pupils are dilated and trembling with visible panic. His forced smile is cracking at the edges. Sweat beads form at his temple. In the soft background blur, two champagne coupes clink together, wine trembling inside the glasses. Dramatic lighting — one side warm, one side cold shadow cutting across his face.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Wide shot of outdoor garden wedding venue. Su Wan, a 28-32 year old woman with black hair in an elegant bridal updo, fair white skin, slender build, wearing a white mermaid wedding gown with hidden monogram embroidery at the waist, stands facing rows of seated guests, raising a champagne glass for a speech. Behind her is a champagne tower glinting in the light. Further behind stands Lu Shen, a 30-35 year old tall man in a black three-piece tuxedo with white rose boutonniere, his expression slowly freezing. Warm lighting beginning to fade to cooler tones.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Medium close-up of Su Wan, a 28-32 year old woman with black hair in an elegant bridal updo, fair white skin, wearing a white mermaid wedding gown, her expression shifting from warmth to solemnity. She holds her champagne glass at chest level. Behind her, blurred guests lean in and whisper to each other. The lighting has shifted to a cooler, more ominous tone. Her eyes carry deep sorrow and quiet determination.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Medium shot transitioning to close-up. Su Wan, a 28-32 year old woman with black hair in an elegant bridal updo, fair white skin, slender build, wearing a white mermaid wedding gown, reaches her slender hand into the inner chest pocket of Lu Shen's black three-piece tuxedo. Lu Shen, a 30-35 year old tall man with short side-parted well-groomed hair, tan wheat-colored skin, stands frozen, his face draining of color. Her movement is gentle but commanding. Dramatic cold lighting casts sharp shadows.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Extreme close-up of a delicate necklace dangling from Su Wan's slender pale fingers. The necklace is identical to the one seen in a small inset photo in the corner showing Su Yao, a 30-34 year old woman with fair white skin and a build similar to Su Wan, wearing a red dress with the same necklace. In the blurred background, Lu Shen stumbles backward, his face ashen white, lips trembling. Guests' blurred faces show shock. Dramatic cold blue lighting with sharp highlights on the necklace.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Handheld shaky-cam style shot. Lu Shen, a 30-35 year old tall man with short side-parted well-groomed hair now disheveled, tan wheat-colored skin, wearing a black three-piece tuxedo with white rose boutonniere askew, lunges forward aggressively with one arm outstretched trying to grab the necklace. His face is contorted with rage and desperation, his genteel facade completely shattered. Motion blur on his reaching hand. Blurred guests recoil in the background. Harsh dramatic lighting with deep shadows.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Low-angle shot looking up at Su Wan, a 28-32 year old woman with black hair in an elegant bridal updo, fair white skin, slender build, wearing a white mermaid wedding gown swaying slightly in the breeze. She stands perfectly still, looking down with ice-cold, emotionless eyes. At the bottom of the frame, Lu Shen is collapsed on the ground, head in his hands, his black three-piece tuxedo rumpled. Harsh dramatic overhead lighting creates a halo effect around Su Wan while Lu Shen is cast in shadow.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Extreme close-up of Su Wan's face, a 28-32 year old woman with black hair in an elegant bridal updo, fair white skin. She wears a faint, cold smile — not a bride's joyful smile but a hunter's satisfied smirk. Her eyes are sharp, calculating, and devoid of warmth. Cold blue lighting sculpts her features with precise shadows. The background is completely dark, isolating her face in the frame.

Cinematic still frame, realistic, consistent character design, high quality, 1080x1920 portrait. Dim, moody wide shot of a dark room one week earlier. Su Wan, a 28-32 year old woman with black hair down (not in bridal updo), fair white skin, slender build, wearing dark casual clothing, sits at a desk illuminated by a single desk lamp. Before her are spread documents — a man's schedule printout and a missing-person report with a photo of Su Yao in a red dress. A voice recorder sits on the desk, its red recording light glowing. Su Wan's expression is focused and determined. Dim warm lamplight in an otherwise dark room.
